channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Hawaii Justices’ Inflammatory Attack on the U.S. Supreme Court
item.description: The state supreme court’s rhetoric could fuel the view that judging is just politics by another name.

item.title: Trump, Ocasio-Cortez spar over communism label as DSA's influence grows in Democratic Party
item.description: Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez pushed back Wednesday on GOP accusations that her fellow democratic socialists will drive into Congress a communist agenda.

item.title: The End of ‘El Mayo’ Is Only the Beginning
item.description: Could the comparative leniency accorded to the cartel lord be a signal that he will share what he knows about Mexico’s corrupted political class?

item.title: Large-Scale Desalination Could Help Offset Colorado River Water Shortage
item.description: The federal government has options for dealing with political resistance in California.
